scripts.build: sh -c 'if [ -f .env.development ]; then set -a; . .env.development; set +a; fi; pnpm tauri build'
scripts.build:linux: sh -c 'if [ -f .env.development ]; then set -a; . .env.development; set +a; fi; pnpm tauri build --target x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu'
scripts.build:macos: sh -c 'if [ -f .env.development ]; then set -a; . .env.development; set +a; fi; pnpm tauri build --target universal-apple-darwin'
scripts.build:windows: sh -c 'if [ -f .env.development ]; then set -a; . .env.development; set +a; fi; pnpm tauri build --target x86_64-pc-windows-msvc'
scripts.clean: pnpm --filter frontend clean && cargo clean --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml
scripts.dev:electron: pnpm build:pollis-node:debug && concurrently -k -n vite,electron 'pnpm --filter frontend dev' 'wait-on -t 30000 tcp:5173 && pnpm --filter @pollis/electron start'
